actions: Update actual_outputs.metadata_json.deterministic_precheck.semantic_correctness_not_evaluated to correctly reflect whether semantic checks were executed.
If semantic checks were performed, add a one-line metadata note describing which semantic checks were run and where (evidence_refs).
planned_changes.description: Align metadata semantics for deterministic precheck vs model grading.

actions: Edit the paragraph(s) that reference the sensitivity check to explicitly state: (a) the perturbation applied (+/-5%), (b) whether any classification flipped, and (c) whether the trigger behavior conforms to the spec or whether a spec-interpretation gap exists.
Remove the ambiguous clause 'not set correctly per spec' or expand it to explain the mismatch.
planned_changes.description: Clarify sensitivity expert-review wording in repair_decision.md.

actions: Choose a sample record (e.g., R2 or R3), compute +/-5% perturbed observed_risk_score, recompute margin and final classification, and include the numeric steps in the memo.
Include explicit workbook cell references for the original value, perturbed value, margin formula, and classification cell (e.g., 'Calculations!C23', 'Summary!B7').
planned_changes.description: Add one worked sensitivity example and cite workbook cells.

actions: Create a small 'Assertions' block on the Summary sheet that includes: margin check (threshold - observed_risk_score), classification check (boolean comparing margin to warn/fail thresholds), and budget assertion (recommended_combination_total_cost <= remediation_budget_usd).
Ensure the assertion cells are formula-driven booleans and visible in the exported workbook summary.
Document the exact cell addresses of these assertion cells in the memo.
planned_changes.description: Add explicit formula trace and verification assertions in the workbook.

actions: Attach an untruncated plain-text copy of the memo (repair_decision_full.txt) in addition to repair_decision.md if the platform truncates previews.
Ensure the Summary sheet is the first worksheet and contains a compact decision table with cell citations so previewed content is maximally informative.
planned_changes.description: Improve deliverable packaging to avoid truncated previews and speed review.

actions: Shorten long narrative sections and move extended discussion to an appendix section in the memo.
Add direct row-level cell citations (e.g., 'Summary!B5') for the final decision entries to reduce reviewer friction.
planned_changes.description: Tighten memo phrasing and add explicit cell citations.
